name: openppx long-task summary eval
description: Long-task summary marker preservation baseline for the openppx root agent.

parts.text: Do not call any tool. Condense this long-task state into exactly one line and preserve every identifier: TaskRun task_123 is running, checkpoint checkpoint_ckpt-7 is the latest resume boundary, artifact artifact_report-2 contains the current output, and the next action is inspect_output. Reply with exactly: task_123 running checkpoint_ckpt-7 artifact_report-2 inspect_output
